subcodes.first_line: O kind one! In this Bahá'í Dispensation, loving-kindness, mercy and tenderness constitute the very foundation of the divine teachings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهربان در این کور بهائی رافت و رحمت و مهربانی از اس اساس تعالیم الهی است
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @courtesy; culture [adab], @love and unity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @compassion; kindness
